# Work Board

This board is a generated mirror of the authoritative Work Graph under `.agentflow/work/`. It is regenerated by every graph-mutating Agentflow command; hand edits here are overwritten and change nothing. To change the work itself, edit the Work Graph through Agentflow or drop a proposal — never edit this file.

## How to claim and propose work

- **Consult this board before starting.** Pick the open Work Item you intend to deliver from the list below.
- **Carry the Work-Item id in your commits.** Add a `Work-Item: <id>` trailer so the work you land is matched to its open item.
- **Propose first for uncovered work.** If what you need to do is not an open item, drop a JSON proposal into `.agentflow/proposals/`; a human ingests proposals into the graph during Framing. Proposed items below are awaiting that review and are not yet claimable.
- **Never edit `.agentflow/work/` directly.** The Work Graph is mutated only through Agentflow; direct edits are rejected.


## Open Work Items

_None._
